title: aster major
intro: Aster major, also known as the Large-flowered Michaelmas daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. It is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aster major include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive problems and skin conditions. Aster major can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, making it a versatile plant for various herbal applications.
